title: anacheilium vasquezii

It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Anacheilium vasquezii include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, attributed to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids.
